name: Olmesartan And Amlodipin Tablets
about: Olmesartan And Amlodipin Tablets are a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure. Each box contains 10x15 tablets with a dosage of 20 & 5 mg. These tablets are a general medicine produced in India. They come in a physical form of tablets that should be stored in a dry and cool place. It is recommended to take this medication as per doctors suggestion.
